back_translation: For the choirmaster. With stringed instruments. A psalm of David.
O God who is my righteousness, when I call, answer me; in distress You gave me a spacious place; be gracious to me and hear my prayer.
O sons of men, how long will you turn my honor into shame? How long will you love what is worthless and seek after falsehood? Selah
Know that the LORD has set apart the faithful one for Himself; the LORD hears when I call to Him.
Tremble in awe, but do not sin; while on your bed, ponder in your hearts and be silent. Selah
Offer the sacrifices of righteousness, and trust in the LORD.
Many say, 'Who will show us good?' O LORD, let the light of Your face shine upon us.
You have given joy in my heart, more than when their grain and new wine abound.
I will lie down and sleep in peace, for You alone, O LORD, make me dwell in safety.
